Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.NotAvailableException

  • Packages that use NotAvailableException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry
    This package contains classes to work with basic geometric entities such as 2D or 3D points, lines, planes, 2D or 3D triangles or polygons, circles, spheres, rotations, transformations etc.
    com.irurueta.geometry.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate basic geometric structures
    com.irurueta.geometry.refiners  

    • Uses of NotAvailableException in com.irurueta.geometry

      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry that throw NotAvailableException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Point3D PinholeCamera.getCameraCenter()
      Returns a 3D point indicating camera center (i.e.
      Rotation3D PinholeCamera.getCameraRotation()
      Returns camera rotation if camera has already been decomposed and rotation is available.
      PinholeCameraIntrinsicParameters PinholeCamera.getIntrinsicParameters()
      Returns camera intrinsic parameters if camera has already been decomposed and intrinsic parameters are available.

    • Uses of NotAvailableException in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators

      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators that throw NotAvailableException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.List<Line2D> LinePlaneCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.getLines2D()
      Returns list of corresponding 2D lines.
      java.util.List<Plane> LinePlaneCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.getPlanes()
      Returns list of corresponding lines/planes.
      java.util.List<Point2D> PointCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.getPoints2D()
      Returns list of corresponding 2D points.
      java.util.List<Point3D> PointCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.getPoints3D()
      Returns list of corresponding 3D points.
      double[] WeightedLinePlaneCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.getWeights()
      Returns array containing a weight amount for each correspondence.
      double[] WeightedPointCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.getWeights()
      Returns array containing a weight amount for each correspondence.

    • Uses of NotAvailableException in com.irurueta.geometry.refiners

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      protected void PinholeCameraRefiner.cameraToParameters​(PinholeCamera camera, double[] result)
      Sets camera parameters into array of parameters.
